title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Teacher Notification – Booking – SF notification sent within 30s
description: AC 05.1 — BR-21: CRUD Testing: When a student books a lesson via app, the assigned teacher must receive a Salesforce notification within 30 seconds with the correct message.
preconditions: A bookable Published lesson exists with Teacher A assigned. Student user books the lesson via the app.
steps_result:
1. "Student books an available lesson via app (tap Reserve → Confirm)"
2. "Check Teacher A's Salesforce notification inbox within 30 seconds"
3. "Read the notification message"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown"
2. "SF notification received by Teacher A"
3. "Message reads: ""[Student Name] has reserved [Lesson Name]"""
milestone_id:
1. ""
2. ""
3. "Student Name = test student; Lesson Name = test lesson"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Teacher Notification – Cancellation – SF notification sent within 30s
description: AC 05.2 — BR-24: CRUD Testing: When a student cancels a booking via app, the assigned teacher must receive a Salesforce notification within 30 seconds with the correct message.
preconditions: A lesson has Teacher A assigned. Student user has an existing booking for this lesson and cancels it via the app.
steps_result:
1. "Student cancels a booked lesson via app (tap Cancel → Cancel Reservation)"
2. "Check Teacher A's Salesforce notification inbox within 30 seconds"
3. "Read the notification message"
steps_data:
1. "Cancellation confirmed; booking removed from list"
2. "SF notification received by Teacher A"
3. "Message reads: ""[Student Name] has cancelled [Lesson Name]"""
milestone_id:
1. ""
2. ""
3. "Student Name = test student; Lesson Name = test lesson"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Teacher Notification – Staff SF assignment – No notification sent
description: AC 03.4 — BR-21: Regression Analysis: When staff assigns a student to a lesson via Salesforce (not via app booking), NO SF teacher notification must be triggered.
preconditions: A lesson with Teacher A assigned. A staff user assigns a student to the lesson via Salesforce Lesson Detail (not via app booking flow).
steps_result:
1. "Staff user assigns a student to the lesson via Salesforce"
2. "Check Teacher A's Salesforce notification inbox"
3. "Confirm notification log"
steps_data:
1. "Student Session created by staff in SF"
2. "No new notification received by Teacher A"
3. "No booking notification event created for staff-triggered assignment"

title: AC 05.1 — BR-24: Notification Isolation: When two students on the same device each book a different lesson (with different teachers), each teacher must receive a notification for their own lesson only.
description:
1. Login as Student 1 → Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 1 → Confirm
2. Switch account to Student 2 on the same device
3. Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 2 → Confirm
4. Check Teacher A's SF notification inbox within 30 seconds
5. Check Teacher B's SF notification inbox within 30 seconds
6. Verify no cross-notifications
preconditions:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown"
2. "Student 2 home screen shown"
3. "Booking Success Screen shown"
4. "Teacher A receives: [Student 1 name] has reserved [Lesson 1 name]"
5. "Teacher B receives: [Student 2 name] has reserved [Lesson 2 name]"
6. "Teacher A has no notification about Lesson 2; Teacher B has no notification about Lesson 1"
postconditions:
1. "Student 1; Lesson 1; Teacher A"
2. ""
3. "Student 2; Lesson 2; Teacher B"
4. ""
5. ""
6. ""

title: AC 05.2 — BR-24: Notification Isolation: When two students on the same device each cancel a different booking, each teacher must receive a cancellation notification for their own lesson only.
description:
1. Login as Student 1 → Booking List → Cancel Lesson 1 → "Cancel Reservation"
2. Switch account to Student 2 on the same device
3. Booking List → Cancel Lesson 2 → "Cancel Reservation"
4. Check Teacher A's SF notification inbox within 30 seconds
5. Check Teacher B's SF notification inbox within 30 seconds
6. Verify no cross-notifications
preconditions:
1. "Cancellation Success; Lesson 1 removed"
2. "Student 2 home screen shown"
3. "Cancellation Success; Lesson 2 removed"
4. "Teacher A receives: [Student 1 name] has cancelled [Lesson 1 name]"
5. "Teacher B receives: [Student 2 name] has cancelled [Lesson 2 name]"
6. "Teacher A has no notification about Lesson 2; Teacher B has no notification about Lesson 1"
postconditions:
1. "Student 1; Lesson 1; Teacher A"
2. ""
3. "Student 2; Lesson 2; Teacher B"
4. ""
5. ""
6. ""

title: AC 03.4 / AC 04.4 — BR-21/BR-24: SF teacher notifications are triggered ONLY by app flows. When staff manually deletes a Student Session, no cancellation notification must be sent to the teacher.
description:
1. Confirm Student Session (Student A, Lesson 1) exists in SF
2. Staff deletes Student Session (Student A, Lesson 1) directly from Salesforce
3. Check Teacher A's SF notification inbox within 30 seconds
4. Confirm notification log
preconditions:
1. "Session present; Teacher A assigned"
2. "Session removed from SF by staff"
3. "No new notification received by Teacher A"
4. "No cancellation notification event created for staff-triggered removal"

title: AC 03.4 — BR-21: When staff manually assigns a student to a lesson via Salesforce, no booking notification must be sent to the teacher. Notification is app-booking-triggered only.
description:
1. Staff user creates Student Session for (Student A, Lesson 1) directly in Salesforce
2. Check Teacher A's SF notification inbox within 30 seconds
3. Confirm notification log
preconditions:
1. "Student Session created; Booking_Flag=FALSE"
2. "No new notification received by Teacher A"
3. "No booking notification event created for staff-triggered assignment"
